channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th June
item.description:
Stats Required FW Abrupt Level Difference 700 x 20mm (Length x Depth) Standard TM (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 16th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown tree growth approx 1,5 meters x3 meters (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 16th June
item.description:
Faded road markings Dashes - 600mm x 30 18mtr Centre line - 4000mm x 3 12mtr Triangle - 4000mm x 1 4mtr Temporary road closure TM required (Faded Road Markings)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 16th June
item.description:

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 16th June
item.description:
Customer has informed us that all the lights are out at the roundabout and some pedestrian crossing lights further down
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Outside cadets, 16th June
item.description:
One of the edging kerbs is loose and rattling.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Arle Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge, 16th June
item.description:
The hedge has overgrown over the footpath and the grass is so long, it all needs a good tidy up, the whole of Longlevens looks a disgrace at the moment, all the fields and hedges are overgrown!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackwater Way, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
Pothole FW 1700x300x20mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 16th June
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 16th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 16th June
item.description:
Give and take 28 days please cut back overgrown hedge and vegetation and stinging netals approx 44meters x3 meters footway closure (Overgrown Hedge)

item.title: Pothole or concrete collapse, 15th June

item.title: Grass is so long it is obscuring my view when reversing out of my drive causing a hazard. Also it is making the neighbourhood look scruffy, 15th June
item.description:
Grass verges outside No’s 47 - 43 Larkhay Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larkhay Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass at skatepark, 15th June
item.description:
Broken glass and rubbish at Cooper's edge skatepark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pulling on overhead broadband line, 15th June
item.description:
I would like to report an issue with the trees lining the pavements on Gratton Road, Cheltenham. In particular, the tree outside of 60/62 Gratton Road is causing issues with the overhead broadband line. One of the branches is seriously pulling on the overhead line, threatening to bring it down. I think that all the trees on the road require some degree of maintenance as they have reached quite an immense height.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Gratton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bin, 15th June
item.description:
Next to parking lay-by

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tobyfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
